eas_text: A civil authority has issued A 911 TELEPHONE OUTAGE EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: McKean, PA; at 4:18 AM on FEB 4, 2019 Effective until 6:18 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: MCKEAN COUNTY IS NOTIFYING RESIDENTS THAT MCKEAN COUNTY 911 CENTER IS DOWN. IF YOU HAVE AN EMERGENCY PLEASE CALL 814-887-4911.
